extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by the group from matters against it: I counted the criminal “Against our Company” (1), “Against our KMPs” (1), and “Against our Subsidiaries” (0) rows, while excluding all “By” rows; statutory/regulatory proceedings against all listed entities are Nil, and tax proceedings against the Company (28) plus subsidiaries (8) total 36, excluding promoter/director personal matters. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹198.34 million plus ₹0.49 million, or ₹198.83 million = ₹19.883 crore; “By” amounts of ₹205.80 million and ₹30.00 million were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated total of ₹192.84 million as of June 30, 2025, equal to ₹19.284 crore, rather than summing the listed components. Company-wide customer concentration is disclosed as a percentage of revenue from operations; for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, top five customers contributed 75.10% and top ten customers 84.98%. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
